# Kommza (Коммза) — Full Reference

> Video conferencing service — instant calls without VPN, without installation, without registration.
> By ООО ЛЕТС (LLC LETS).

## What is Kommza?

Kommza is a video conferencing platform for meetings, webinars, and streams.
It works in the browser on any device — no app install needed. Guests join via link
without registration. Developed by ООО ЛЕТС (LLC LETS).

Коммза — платформа для видеовстреч, вебинаров и стримов. Работает в браузере
на любом устройстве. Серверы в России, не требует VPN.

## Key Differentiators

- No VPN needed — local servers, accessible without VPN
- No installation — works directly in browser
- No registration for guests — join via link
- Webinars up to 200 participants with recording
- Calendar sync with Yandex Calendar and Google Calendar
- AI assistant (coming soon) — meeting summaries, reminders, scheduling
- Mobile apps for iOS and Android
- Ecosystem-independent — not tied to any platform

## Use Cases

### Teams & IT
Daily standups in 2 minutes: link, call, back to work.

### Corporate Meetings
Vendor-neutral. Not tied to Teams or Google. Any counterparty can join.

### HR & Recruiting
Candidate clicks the link — interview starts on time. No app install required.

### Consulting
Client clicks the link and joins consultation instantly. No registration.

### Sales & Demo
Screen sharing with recording — client sees everything.

### Education
Webinars up to 200 people with recording and interactive features.

## Pricing (RUB, monthly)

| Plan     | Price            | Max Users | Meeting Duration | Key Features                              |
|----------|------------------|-----------|------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| Start    | 0 ₽ (free)       | 10        | 1 hour           | Background blur, 1 trial webinar          |
| Pro      | 450 ₽/month      | 20        | 2 hours          | 10 recordings, 1 webinar/month, backgrounds |
| Team     | 850 ₽/user/month | 100       | Unlimited        | 30 recordings, unlimited webinars, AI assistant |
| Business | 9,600 ₽/month    | 200       | Unlimited        | 100 recordings, all features, priority support |

Payment: monthly or discounted for longer periods. Scale up by adding users as needed.

## FAQ

Q: Do I need to install an app?
A: No. Kommza works in the browser on computer, tablet, and phone. Mobile apps for iOS and Android are also available.

Q: Is registration required?
A: No. Guests join via link instantly. Registration is only needed for advanced features like recordings, webinars, and team management.

Q: Is Kommza suitable for business use?
A: Yes. Team syncs, interviews, consultations, demos, and client meetings. Webinars up to 200 participants with recording.

Q: How secure is Kommza?
A: Dedicated local servers. We comply with data protection requirements. The service is not tied to social networks or ecosystems.

Q: Is the AI assistant available?
A: AI features are launching in phases. The assistant will help capture meeting outcomes, prepare protocols, and remind about agreements.

Q: Can I use it for free?
A: Yes. The Start plan is free — up to 10 participants and meetings up to 1 hour. Upgrade when you need more.

## Technical Details

- Platform: Web (any modern browser), iOS, Android
- Technology: WebRTC + Janus Gateway
- Dashboard: hub.kommza.io
- Instant meeting (no registration): meeting.kommza.io/unregistered-meeting
